projects.title: Moi proekty
projects.empty: Poka net proektov. Sozdaite pervyi proekt.

page.demoReadonlyBanner: Demo-rezhim publichnyy i dostupen tolko dlya chteniya. Vy mozhete prosmatrivat dannye i stroit grafiki, no redaktirovanie tablicy otklyucheno.

readOnly.saveChartsDisabled: Demo-rezhim tolko dlya chteniya. Sohranenie grafikov otklyucheno.
readOnly.importDisabled: Demo-rezhim tolko dlya chteniya. Import otklyuchen.
readOnly.tableEditsDisabled: Demo-rezhim tolko dlya chteniya. Redaktirovanie tablicy otklyucheno.
readOnly.semanticEditsDisabled: Demo-rezhim tolko dlya chteniya. Semanticheskie izmeneniya otklyucheny.
readOnly.ordinalEditsDisabled: Demo-rezhim tolko dlya chteniya. Izmenenie poryadkovoy posledovatelnosti otklyucheno.
readOnly.renamingDisabled: Demo-rezhim tolko dlya chteniya. Pereimenovanie otklyucheno.
readOnly.deletingDisabled: Demo-rezhim tolko dlya chteniya. Udalenie otklyucheno.

charts.buildBeforeSaving: Postroyte grafik pered sohraneniem v biblioteku proekta.
charts.nameCannotBeEmpty: Nazvanie grafika ne mozhet byt pustym.
charts.deleteConfirm: Udalit etot sohranennyy grafik iz biblioteki proekta?

dataset.importValidationIssues: Import zavershen s oshibkami validatsii. Proverte otchet.
dataset.manualImportFailed: Ne udalos sozdat tablicu iz vvedennyh vruchnuyu dannyh.

avatar.tooLarge: Izobrazhenie slishkom bolshoe. Maksimalnyy razmer 5 MB.

danger.title: Opasnaya zona
danger.description: Udalenie akkaunta navsegda udalit vash profil i vse proekty.
danger.confirm: Udalit akkaunt navsegda? Eto deystvie nelzya otmenit.

hero.eyebrow: Integrirovannoe rabochee prostranstvo dlya analiza dannyh
hero.title: Perehodite ot syryh tablits k ponyatnym vyvodam v odnom sobranom potoke.
hero.lead: DataViz pomogaet importirovat, validirovat, redaktirovat, summarizovat i vizualizirovat tablichnye dannye v odnom meste. Servis podhodit dlya uchebnyh proektov, akademicheskih demonstratsiy i bystryh analiticheskih iteratsiy.

capabilitiesSection.title: Vse neobhodimoe dlya raboty s dannymi v tablichnom formate.
capabilitiesSection.description: Platforma derzhit osnovnoy put analiza v odnom strukturirovannom rabochem prostranstve, chtoby polzovatel fokusirovalsya na dannyh, a ne na skleyke instrumentov.

import.title: Import CSV ili TXT naborov dannyh
import.text: Bystro nachnite s tablichnymi faylami i perenesite syrie dannye v vydelennoe proektnoe prostranstvo.

validate.title: Validatsiya struktury i znacheniy
validate.text: Proveryayte opredelennye stolbtsy i nahodite problemy do togo, kak tratit vremya na grafiki i interpretatsiyu.

edit.title: Prosmotr i redaktirovanie strok
edit.text: Ispravlyayte zapisi v interfeise, gde tablica yavlyaetsya osnovoy raboty s dannymi.

stats.title: Postroenie svodnoy statistiki
stats.text: Poluchayte bystrye opisatelnye metriky, chtoby ponyat raspredeleniya i opredelit sleduyuschiy shag analiza.

chart.title: Sozdanie poleznyh vizualizatsiy
chart.text: Stroyte grafiki na osnove ochishchennyh dannyh i perehodite ot znacheniy k ponyatnym vizualnym syuzhetam.

workspace.title: Rabota v odnom svyazannom potoke
workspace.text: Izbegayte razroznennoj tsepochki instrumentov i uderzhivayte import, ochistku, analiz i grafiki v edinom kontekste.

advantagesSection.title: Sozdana dlya prakticheskogo analiza, a ne dlya fragmentirovannyh workflow.
advantagesSection.description: Tipichnye workflow raznosyat ochistku dannyh, validatsiyu i postroenie grafikov po raznym instrumentam. DataViz svyazyvaet eti etapy, chtoby kazhdoe reshenie bylo prozrachnym i bystro proveryalos.

workspace.title: Odno prostranstvo vmesto razbrosannyh instrumentov
workspace.text: Snizte kolichestvo pereklyucheniy mezhdu tablitsami, skriptami i konstruktorami grafikov.

validation.title: Validatsiya do vizualizatsii
validation.text: Nahodite problemy shemy i znacheniy ranshe, chtoby zashchitit kachestvo grafikov i interpretatsiyu.

tableFirst.title: Redaktirovanie cherez tablitsu
tableFirst.text: Delajte bystrye ispravleniya dannyh tam, gde stroki vidny srazu, ne vyhodya iz analiza.

feedback.title: Bystraya analiticheskaya obratnaya svyaz
feedback.text: Svodnaya statistika daet momentalnye kontrolnye tochki pri utochnenii naborov dannyh.

foundation.title: Stabilnaya osnova dlya akademicheskogo rasshireniya
foundation.text: Arhitektura podgotovlena dlya demonstratsiy v ramkah diplomnyh rabot i iterativnogo rosta funkcionalnosti.

statsSection.title: Ot vhoda k insightu s men'shim chislom dvizhuschihsya chastey.
statsSection.description: Eti chisla summarizuyut mashtab osnovnogo workflow i pokazyvayut, kak platforma derzhit put analiza kompaktnym i ponyatnym.

steps.label: Etapy workflow
steps.text: Ot pervogo importa do vyvodov na osnove grafikov.

actions.label: Osnovnye deystviya platformy
actions.text: Import, validatsiya, prosmotr, redaktirovanie, analiz, vizualizatsiya.

inputs.label: Formaty tablichnogo vhoda
inputs.text: Gotovo dlya CSV i TXT naborov dannyh.

workspace.label: Integrirovannaya sreda
workspace.text: Odno mesto dlya polnogo tsikla podgotovki dannyh.

workflowSection.title: Yasnyy workflow ot pervoy zagruzki do finalnogo resheniya.
workflowSection.description: Kazhdyy etap prednamerenno prost, poetomu platforma podhodit dlya diplomnyh demonstratsiy, zanyatiy i bystrogo eksploratornogo analiza.

create.title: Sozdayte proekt
create.text: Otkroyte chistoe rabochee prostranstvo dlya odnogo nabora dannyh ili issledovatelskogo voprosa.

import.title: Importiruyte nabor dannyh
import.text: Zagruzite CSV ili TXT fayly i nachnite s vidimoy tablichnoy struktury.

validate.title: Provalidiruyte i prover'te
validate.text: Prosmotrite stolbtsy, kachestvo znacheniy i pervye proverki soglasovannosti.

analyze.title: Redaktiruyte i analiziruyte
analyze.text: Ochischayte stroki napryamuyu i smotrite svodnuyu statistiku dlya dalshego napravleniya.

visualize.title: Vizualiziruyte i predstavlyayte
visualize.text: Stroyte ponyatnye grafiki i prevrashchayte nahodki v poleznye vyvody.

section.title: Sozdayte vizualnye istorii za sekundy s pomoschyu vedomogo potoka.
section.description: Eto mini-demo pokazyvaet, kak bystro mozhno pereklyuchat tipy grafikov i vse ravno poluchat chistyy, chitaemyy i gotovyy k prezentatsii rezultat.

benefits.refresh: Mgnovennoe obnovlenie prevyu bez ruchnoy perenastroyki.
benefits.visuals: Edinye temnye vizualy dlya otchetov i demonstratsiy.
benefits.workflow: Te zhe printsipy workflow, chto i v polnom workspace proekta.

quality.label: Trend kachestva
quality.title: Kachestvo validatsii uluchshaetsya posle kazhdoi iteratsii
quality.subtitle: Skor konsistentnosti datasetu po sprintam

distribution.label: Smes kategoriy
distribution.title: Raspredelenie ochishchennyh dannyh po segmentam
distribution.subtitle: Stroki, sohranennye posle validatsii i redaktirovaniya

impact.label: Rost insightov
impact.title: Kolichestvo prakticheskih nahodok v kazhdom tsikle analiza
impact.subtitle: Kak bystro rastut insights v odnom workspace

finalCta.title: Soberite sleduyuschuyu istoriyu nabora dannyh bez pereklyucheniya mezhdu instrumentami.
finalCta.description: Sozdayte proekt, zagruzite dannye i perehodite pryamo k validatsii, analizu i vizualnoy otchetnosti.

errors.sessionExpired: Sessiya istekla ili CSRF-token nedeystvitelen. Povtorite popytku.
errors.networkUnavailable: Ne udaetsya podklyuchitsya k API. Proverte set i backend-server.
